positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a stylized cosmic sloth hanging from a crescent moon, surrounded by floating bioluminescent nebula dust and small crystalline stardust. The sloth should be rendered with elegant, clean silhouettes, emphasized by thin, glowing neon outlines. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, making it ideal for a T-shirt print. Style should blend modern kawaii aesthetic with celestial, spiritual art, utilizing deep indigo, soft lavender, and electric teal accents against a muted cream background. Crisp vector quality, high contrast, perfect for screen printing, highly detailed linework.
